message.content:
@startuml
actor "havenarbeider" as H
actor "douane en voedselinspectie" as D
actor "scheepsagent" as S
participant "Api gateway" as A
participant "kapiteinsdienst" as K
participant "administratie" as Ad
participant "containerbeheer en -transport" as C

frame "per schip" {
    S -> A: registerVessel
    A -> K: registerVessel
    K -> Ad: requestOffer
    Ad --> K: offerCreated
    Ad -> C: newContainerList
    opt [deleteOffer]
        S -> A: offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
        A -> K: offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
        K -> Ad: deleteOffer
    end
    D -> A: getDocuments
    A -> Ad: getDocuments
    Ad --> A
    A --> D
}

frame "per havenarbeider" {
    H -> A: timeBadging
    A -> Ad: timeBadging
    H -> A: getPayCheck
    A -> Ad: getPayCheck
    Ad --> A
    A --> H
}

@enduml
